context_for_next_testing_agent: Checklist category ordering verified. Categories display in correct order: 1_Legal_Safety (Legal & Safety), 2_Core_Training (Core Training), 3_Role_Readiness (Role Readiness), 4_Employment, 5_Agreements, 6_Admin. The 'What's Needed' tab shows all 23 compliance requirements with 'Still Needed' status badges for items without evidence. 'Add Document' buttons are present on all items. Backend MANDATORY_ITEMS dictionary in server.py defines the categories. Frontend categoryOrder array in EmployeeProfilePage.js (lines 2168-2175) controls display order.
